docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $624.80 FILED BY MCGEE JOSEPH F. DDS AS TO DEFENDANT GILL JAN RUTLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
